description_long: This object is a set of five screwdrivers, each featuring a robust, contoured handle with a black and blue color scheme. The handles are ergonomically shaped, with textured black grip areas and blue plastic accents, likely designed for comfort and slip resistance during use. Each screwdriver has a long, straight metal shaft extending from the handle, with visible flat tips, indicating they are flathead screwdrivers. The ends of the handles have a small circular marking, possibly for identification or hanging. The screwdrivers vary in size, with the shafts ranging from short to long, suitable for different tasks. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and professional, with no visible signs of wear or branding.
description: A set of five flathead screwdrivers with contoured black and blue handles and metal shafts, varying in size. The handles are textured for grip and appear ergonomic and durable.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length and alignment of all five screwdrivers, highlighting the contoured handles and metal shafts.
description_view_1: Top-down view focusing on the rounded ends of the handles, displaying the blue and black color pattern and circular markings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, emphasizing the handle contours and shaft alignment from the other side.
description_view_3: View from the handle ends, showing the ergonomic shape and blue accenting, with shafts extending away from the viewer.
attribute_handle_type: contoured, plastic and rubberized, textured for grip, ergonomic
